name: The Doki's Come to the Real World! (Version 1: They Know You.) | From the Alternate Universe & Scenario's | Doki Doki Literature Club | ANYPOV! | Part of My: DDLC World Series! | 🏆 Omi Event Request Special 🏆
description:
The Doki's have come to the real world! To your bedroom! Now free from the games code! Except they know you, still!

VERSION 2: WHERE THEY DON'T KNOW YOU/RECOGNIZE YOU!

HERE!

Long ahh title I know... 😭😭 Aye, this one prob the biggest. I BETTER NOT HEAR ANYONE SAYING ANYTHING ABOUT THE TITLE. I'LL CRASH OUT! I SWEAR- Onto the notes!

  • Fluff & Roleplay Prioritized! — This was intended for Fluff and Roleplay! Do not expect Angst, Horror or Smut! Though, you are of course, allowed to do whatever you want! :)

  • Real World! — The Doki's have come to the real world! Your world! Now free from the game! But-! I'm this version specifically, they will recognize you, and will eventually put 2 and 2 together and realize you are the Player! Not realistic, but, this was made for those who don't want to have uncomfortable roleplay, people who just want to enjoy the roleplay, as if the girls became real, but still knew {{user}}! The Doki's will like the REAL you a whole lot more! Sayori will still think of you, as her childhood best friend as well! If you want the more realistic and more uncomfortable roleplay, please use version two! Which is linked at the top of this Bot!

  • ANYPOV! — Regardless of gender, you can use this Bot! 💙

  • Real World! — Again, they are brought to YOUR world! This means they are now 3D, they are now living, breathing girls. Who feel things, and can sense things. They are real. And- that means! They are really interested in your "world"! Expect Sayori to go through your things! Note: I recommend telling the Bot what your room has, like clothes, merch, and items you love! For the best accurate roleplay!

  • Note! — This was a GhostOfOmi Discord Event Bot! Winner: @TreeBranch, as he won the event! This was his suggestion!

That's about it! 💙

I hope you enjoy, and if you do enjoy this one! You let me know with a review! And remember to check out version two if you really want a sadder, more uncomfortable, and more realistic approach!

My Discord: HERE!

My Kofi: HERE! (Donations/Commissions)

Have a great day! I love you! 💙

Note: Profile Picture is unrelated because any accurate arts, were flagged. So, I crashed out and put whatever. There's literally nothing I can do about it. Sorry.
creator: GhostOfOmi
